source_or_gap: Pinned local MoECOT Manifest project source and unresolved primary provenance across CCA, BeastBrain, BugBrain, Corben's Trainer, and Corben's Best Model Possible.
chapter_action_policy: Update existing chapters with bounded implementation-reference mechanisms after cross-project provenance and exact claim mapping; do not add a MoECOT-specific chapter.
merge_or_split_policy: Merge findings into existing layer owners. Treat repeated CCA/MoECOT mechanisms as one evolving lineage until predecessor projects establish primary provenance.
boundary_decision_rationale: MoECOT is a convergence compiler/control-plane reference. Its distinct ideas—compiler-wide governance, semantic portability, context routing, evidence-bound improvement, and maintenance packets—already have chapter owners.
external_literature_need: open-ended improvement and architecture-debt governance comparators
independent external benchmark sources for any numeric capability comparison
proof_or_test_backlog: classify all 124 semantic contracts by implementation and evidence state
run one bounded semantic-substrate deterministic pass after project provenance mining
audit one competitive-run effect-log and semantic-patch obligation bundle for lineage consistency
replay one retained holdout artifact family only if exact inputs and environment are preserved
evidence_transition_precondition: exact project passages or code surfaces mapped to each book claim
cross-project primary provenance and deduplication completed
numeric results reproduced or explicitly retained as source-reported context
accepted Appendix C transition recorded before any support promotion
required_before_drafting: mine BeastBrain, BugBrain, Corben's Trainer, and Corben's Best Model Possible
keep raw private project material outside the public repository
separate contract presence, fixture evidence, implemented runtime, and measured result
preserve external-holdout failures and harness-repair history
promotion_blockers: expensive tests and reported experiments not reproduced
many contract thresholds are local policy constants
source-publication permission is not recorded for the raw project tree
residuals: retained run artifacts need canonical-versus-stale lineage audit
external primary sources cited by project research notes need separate ingestion
next_action: Mine BeastBrain as the likely primary memory/lattice predecessor, then deduplicate MoECOT and CCA mechanisms before exact book claim mappings.
non_claims: does not claim MoECOT capability, safety, corrigibility, efficiency, AGI, or ASI
does not reproduce project training, benchmark, portability, attestation, or deployment results
does not count contract files as implemented capabilities
does not promote an ASI Stack support state
